config.title: Stamps of Gold
config.subtitle: Every stamp is a step closer to a jar full of gold.
config.message: Fill a card with 10 stamps and trade it in for a real nugget of gold. — Kam

stamps.reason: For staying up. No more staying up!
For all the work you've done for the app. Ideas, write ups, testing, feedback, getting beta tester and much much more.
